## Task Context

target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### NbdevTaskContext

>  NbdevTaskContext (project:pathlib.Path, total_steps:int, task:Any=None)

*Context manager for nbdev-specific long-running tasks.*

Wraps MCP task context with nbdev project awareness and progress
tracking helpers.

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>project</td>
<td>Path</td>
<td></td>
<td>Path to the nbdev project.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>total_steps</td>
<td>int</td>
<td></td>
<td>Total number of steps in the task.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>task</td>
<td>Any</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>MCP ServerTaskContext for progress updates.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

### enable_nbdev_tasks

>  enable_nbdev_tasks (mcp:mcp.server.fastmcp.server.FastMCP)

*Enable experimental tasks on the MCP server.*

This must be called before registering any task-based tools.
